title: Dear Neighbor Template 2
body:
Dear Neighbor,
My name is Shawn, and I am a local developer with SGHomes group in Saratoga specializing in properties within our own community and I am interested in buying your property in Saratoga.
We just finished our latest project on Paseo Cerro Street in the Quito Village Neighborhood and are currently actively seeking our next prospect in the neighborhood.
WE BUY YOUR HOUSE FOR CASH IN 7 DAYS!
	•	We Offer Over Market Value
	•	We Buy Houses in As-Is Condition
	•	We Pay the Closing Costs
	•	No Inspection/Realtor Fees
	•	Close in As Little As 7 Days
	•	Free Rent-Back Period if Needed
Call for a Free No-Obligation Competitive Offer!
Not for you? If you know someone who is looking to sell, we offer generous referral fees!
SGHomes Family Group
Email: SGHomesgroup@gmail.com
Cell: (408)-780-9796
Cell: (650)-450-4653

title: Email template for follow up
body:
Email template for follow up
Just change out location
Quito Vilage:
Hi,
I hope this email finds you well!
This is Shawn Ghandchi with Keller Williams Realty. I am reaching out following our recent conversation regarding the potential sale of your property. Our team recently had the pleasure of assisting your neighbors with the successful sale of their home on Paseo Cerro Ave. in the beautiful Quito Village neighborhood.
As discussed, we are currently interested in purchasing properties off-market in as-is condition, all cash, and can close in as little as 7 days. Additionally, we can offer a free rent-back period if needed, providing you with more flexibility and convenience.
If there is any additional information you would like to discuss further please don't hesitate to reach out to me. I've attached our information below for your reference.
Thank you for your time, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.
Best regards,
Shawn Ghandchi, Realtor
Keller Williams Santa Clara Valley
Top 1% Realtor
Instagram: Shawnghomes
Mobile: (408)-780-9796
Mobile: (408)-800-8837
DRE# 01979089
